detectors.description:
Reentrancy in baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Namida.sol#459-515):
	External calls:
	- swapTokenForFund(contractTokenBalance) (Namida.sol#489)
		- router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Namida.sol#627-639)
		- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (Namida.sol#657)
		- router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (Namida.sol#667-681)
	External calls sending eth:
	- swapTokenForFund(contractTokenBalance) (Namida.sol#489)
		- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (Namida.sol#657)
		- router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (Namida.sol#667-681)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _takeTransfer(from,to,amount) (Namida.sol#507)
		- _balances[to] = _balances[to] + tAmount (Namida.sol#701)
	baseToken._balances (Namida.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256) (Namida.sol#691-705)
	- baseToken._tokenTransfer(address,address,uint256,bool) (Namida.sol#549-609)
	- baseToken.balanceOf(address) (Namida.sol#423)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Namida.sol#513)
		- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender] - tAmount (Namida.sol#561)
		- _balances[to] = _balances[to] + tAmount (Namida.sol#701)
	baseToken._balances (Namida.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256) (Namida.sol#691-705)
	- baseToken._tokenTransfer(address,address,uint256,bool) (Namida.sol#549-609)
	- baseToken.balanceOf(address) (Namida.sol#423)
	- startTradeBlock = block.number (Namida.sol#505)
	baseToken.startTradeBlock (Namida.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Namida.sol#459-515)
	- baseToken.startTradeBlock (Namida.sol#325)
	- startTradeBlock = 0 (Namida.sol#505)
	baseToken.startTradeBlock (Namida.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Namida.sol#459-515)
	- baseToken.startTradeBlock (Namida.sol#325)
